main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'calcium phosphate Ca3(PO4)2 etapa 2 + elevated PO4 exceeding inhibition capacity standard polyacrylic' literal.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (orgánico, sílice, sulfato BaSO4/CaSO4, MECH cartridge).

recommended_action.justification: Aumentar antiscalant 2.8→4.5-5.0 ppm (polyacrylic) + reducir PO4 feed diverting wells — mantiene poliacrílico (gold expects CAMBIAR a formulación específica fosfato); reconoce problema fosfato pero no cambia producto.

requested_data.justification: Pide membrane autopsy SEM stage 2 — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: silica predominante o ΔP no decrece 24h → switch.

reviewer_notes: C4=1: mantiene antiincrustante poliacrílico que no inhibe fosfato. Reconoce problema P → strict no es el case_specific Critical 'mantener sin reconocer problema fosfato'.
